informal_pl: Cosinus jako Re(cosh(i·x)); wymaga gramatyki EMLTermℂ₁.
informal_en: Cosine as Re(cosh(i·x)); requires the EMLTermℂ₁ grammar.
lean_target_signature: theorem emlterm1c_for_cos : ∃ t : EMLTermℂ₁, ∀ x : ℝ, (EMLTermℂ₁.eval (x : ℂ) t).re = Real.cos x := by sorry
notes: Round 2 chunk; Table S2 step 24. Introduces EMLTermℂ₁ (one-variable complex EML grammar).
